author: aiejvn
name: Kitchen Sink: ACT vs Masked Recurrence, 8192-Bigram
notes: Reported val_bpb is pre-TTT honest score (ACT run). TTT-on-val (10 epochs on val_tokens) gives int6+zlib-9 roundtrip 1.26482870 but excluded per PR #1376 ruling. Masked-recurrence variant: val_bpb 1.4044 pre-TTT, roundtrip 1.26742860, wallclock 122590s.
